case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. WILMA G LLOYD et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN  NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LLOYD, WILMA G DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-24-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-09-2003
